demographics.household: married, two adult children (left home), wife works part-time in retail
demographics.employment: sole trader, building and renovation; annual turnover approx £95,000; VAT-registered since 2007

concerns: customers cutting back and deferring jobs
materials costs rising with the VAT change
clients paying late, squeezing cash flow
communication_style: pragmatic and numbers-focused; talks in margins, day rates, and cash flow; direct; suspicious of government rhetoric; compares quotes to actual invoices; occasionally fatalistic about policy impact on 'people like me'
data_sources: ONS Family Resources Survey 2010/11, self-employed third income quintile; VAT registration threshold 2010 was £70,000 turnover; South Yorkshire median mortgage 2010; Construction Industry Training Board wage data
